name: /operator-extension-init scaffolds a source-namespace extension file with the right name pattern
command: mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/google && printf 'source:\n  id: google-tsguide\n' > generated-code-quality-standards/google/tsguide.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/operator-extension-init.sh" google tsguide --root generated-code-quality-standards 2>err.txt && [ -f generated-code-quality-standards/_operator/google/tsguide-extensions.yaml ] && echo ok 1>&2
